creative_brief: Clean, single-column layout. Bold '23 June' as a visual anchor near the top. Numbered list styled as a simple checklist graphic. Warm off-white background, FarmThru green CTA button.
subject: One week, {first_name}. The round opens 23 June.
preheader: Here's exactly what to do before Tuesday. Takes two minutes.
body:
Hi {first_name},

Seven days from now, the FarmThru round opens.

Not a soft launch. Not a waitlist shuffle. The actual moment you can own a piece of the grocery store that pays farmers first.

You joined because something felt wrong. The supermarket didn't know where your food came from. Honestly, neither did you. FarmThru fixes that: order online, collect from your nearest hub, and know exactly which farm grew it.

But this email isn't about the food.

It's about Tuesday, 23 June.

Here's your two-minute game plan before the round opens:

1. Block 23 June in your calendar now. Early investors on day one set the tone for the whole round.
2. Read the offer document on Birchal before you invest. Not after. Before.
3. Decide your number. Minimum is $50. Take sixty seconds and pick a figure you're genuinely comfortable with.

That's it. Three steps. Two minutes.

When the round opens next Tuesday, you won't be scrambling. You'll already know your answer.

If you want early access and a 24-hour head start before the public, upgrade to a VIP spot before Sunday. Details on the page below.

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
